# Commercial Mortgages Portsmouth
> Specialist commercial mortgage broker for Portsmouth, the Solent and South Hampshire. Defence and naval supply chain, leisure and hospitality, HMO portfolio, retail, semi-commercial and trading-business commercial mortgages from a 90+ lender panel including Shawbrook, InterBay Commercial, LendInvest, Cynergy Bank, Lloyds, NatWest, Barclays and Santander. Indicative terms in 48 hours, completion typically 4 to 8 weeks.

## Content Hierarchy
- /: Homepage with Portsmouth market snapshot, live planning pipeline, calculator, lender panel, area grid, case studies, testimonials, FAQ
- /services/: Commercial mortgage product hub
- /property-types/: Coverage by sector
- /areas/: Portsmouth sub-areas with commercial planning and market data
- /calculator/: Commercial mortgage repayment and LTV calculator
- /blog/: Market commentary and rate insights
- /case-studies/: Anonymised real deals
- /about/: Broker bio and credentials
- /how-it-works/: 5-step process
- /contact/: Enquiry form
- /faq/: Frequently asked questions

## Key Facts
- Service: Commercial mortgages
- Coverage: Portsmouth (the only UK island city), Cosham, Drayton, Hayling Island fringe, the Solent corridor and South Hampshire
- Facility size: £150K to £10M
- Term: 5 to 25 years
- LTV: typically 65 to 75% (semi-commercial up to 75%, leisure/hospitality and trading-business 60 to 70%, HMO investment 65 to 75%)
- Rates (mid-2026): 6.0 to 9.0% pa
- Lender panel: 90+ lenders
- Decision time: indicative terms in 48 hours
- Named lenders: Shawbrook, InterBay Commercial, LendInvest, Cynergy Bank, Lloyds, NatWest, Barclays, Santander, plus 80+ others (Hampshire Trust Bank locally headquartered)

## Data
Each area page contains live local market data:
- Land Registry sold-data signal (residential transaction volume as market temperature)
- Live commercial planning pipeline from Portsmouth City Council
- Named regeneration zones and business districts (Tipner Regeneration, Gunwharf Quays, Commercial Road, Lakeside North Harbour, The Clocktower, Voyager Park)
- Named demand anchors (Royal Navy and BAE Systems defence cluster, Queen Alexandra Hospital, University of Portsmouth)
- Lender appetite by sector
